channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Best Permanent Outdoor Lights (2026): Govee, Eufy, Cync
item.description: Permanent eave lights that attach to the exterior of your home are becoming more popular. But are they worth the effort and cost?

item.title: Ikea's New Blow-Up Chair Was Tested by Cats
item.description: Part of the new PS 2026 collection, it's taken the Swedish company 26 years to finally nail inflatable furniture.

item.title: I took over 2,000 photos with the incredibly versatile Oppo Find X9 Ultra — here are my favorites, including portraits, long exposures and panoramas
item.description: I used the Oppo Find X9 Ultra for a month as my primary phone, taking over 2,000 photos and videos. Here are my favorites

item.title: Tim Cook quitte la présidence d’Apple, fuite ANTS, Bouygues hausse prix, test du Oppo Find X9 Ultra : L’actu tech de la semaine
item.description: Cette semaine, l’actualité tech a été marquée par des sujets très variés : politique et Apple, cybersécurité en France, hausse de prix chez les opérateurs, mais aussi nouveaux smartphones et innovations hardware. Voici l’essentiel des articles les plus lus sur Frandroid.

item.title: S26 Ultra, Pixel 10, iPhone 17 Pro : le Honor 600 les bat tous dans notre test labo sur la luminosité
item.description: Le Honor 600 atteint un pic lumineux impressionnant de 5918 cd/m², surpassant non seulement ses concurrents, mais aussi les smartphones les plus hauts de gamme du marché. Cette performance est particulièrement utile pour une utilisation en extérieur sous une forte luminosité, bien que le pic soit fugace. Cette performance ne semble pas impacter l'autonomie du Honor 600 qui reste correcte....

item.title: Honor 600 : déjà 200 € de remise sur ce nouveau rival aux Galaxy A57 et Pixel 10a
item.description: Un nouveau smartphone milieu de gamme vient de faire son entrée sur le marché et il s'agit du Honor 600. Un modèle qui a de quoi faire de l'ombre aux récents Galaxy A57 et Pixel 10a, d'autant plus qu'on l'a noté 9/10 et, pour son lancement, sa version 512 Go perd 200 euros de son prix.

item.title: Della Optima TP Series Mini-Split AC Review: Cheap, Smart, and (Mostly) Reliable
item.description: Ductless AC systems get smart tech features—and the growing pains that come with them.

item.title: What Type of Mattress Is Right for You? (2026)
item.description: Here’s how to pick the best mattress for your sleep needs, straight from a professional mattress tester.

item.title: Guide 2026 : quels sont les meilleurs écrans PC gamer ?
item.description: Vous jouez sur PC ? Voici notre sélection des meilleurs écrans PC gamer, OLED ou mini-LED, en QHD ou en 4K, 144 Hz ou plus… Ultra premium ou bien plus abordable, ce guide répondra à tous les besoins et tous les budgets pour profiter au mieux de vos jeux sur PC.

item.title: DJI Lito 1 vs DJI Mini 4K — here's what I'd buy right now
item.description: There's a new best DJI 'drone for beginners' about to hit the market - but is it a better buy than the excellent DJI Mini 4k?

item.title: Apple’s CEO transition is one of the most carefully choreographed in corporate history. Here’s what comes next
item.description: Leadership changes can send stocks tumbling. Here’s how Apple tested and tightly controlled the news that John Ternus would be replacing Tim Cook as CEO. Earlier this week, Apple made its biggest announcement of the year, and no, it wasn’t about a new iPhone. The company announced that longtime CEO Tim Cook would be stepping down as chief executive, to be succeeded by hardware chief John Ternus in September....

item.title: This backup Mac might become your favorite at just $430
item.description: Get a near-mint Apple MacBook Pro (2020) with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD for just $429.97.

item.title: Stop guessing which AI model is best — test them all at once for $74.97
item.description: Compare 25+ leading AI models side by side in one platform with ChatPlayground AI, now $74.97 for lifetime access through May 10.

item.title: Get Microsoft Office for life at a throwback ’90s price with this $30 deal
item.description: Get eight apps for life for just $32.97 with this Microsoft Office Professional 2021 for Windows deal.

item.title: 4 tips for using hookup apps discretely — advice for Feeld, Tinder, AdultFriendFinder, and Grindr
item.description: How to use hookup apps discretely. Advice for AdultFriendFinder, Grindr, and more hookup apps.
